walletPass.warningBody: Apple Wallet passes work best on iPhone, iPad, or Mac. You can still download the pass file, but you may not be able to open it on this device.

cart.itemsInCart: {count, plural, one {# item} other {# items}} in your cart

ticketsDisplay.notForSaleYet: Tickets are not for sale yet
ticketsDisplay.includesTickets: Includes tickets for {count, plural, one {# person} other {# people}}
ticketsDisplay.soldOutBanner: Online tickets are sold out, but you can still get the tickets for you and your friends when you arrive at the event. Cash only.
ticketsDisplay.batchSoldOutBanner: This ticket batch for Endemit 2026 is sold out. We will be releasing the next ticket batch soon. Stay tuned!

saveTheDate.heading: {count, plural, one {Save the date} other {Save the dates}}

events.moreAnnouncedSoon: More events will be announced soon

artists.subscribePrompt: Subscribe and be notified about our events and lineups

venues.dontMissNextEvent: Don't miss the next event at {name}
venues.subscribePrompt: Subscribe and be notified about our events and lineups

category.empty: There are currently no products in {categoryName}

success.title: Order Confirmed!
success.thankYou: Thank you for your order. A confirmation email has been sent to
success.ticketsNote: Your tickets for {names} will also be sent to your email shortly, within the next 30 minutes.

interrupted.title: Your payment was interrupted!
interrupted.heading: Payment Not Completed
interrupted.body: You returned from the payment page without completing your order. Don't worry, your cart is still saved.

emptyCart.title: Your cart is empty.
emptyCart.body: Visit the <link>Support us section</link> to select products for your purchase and support our non-profit work.

cart.heading: Cart ({count, plural, one {# item} other {# items}})

checkout.updateInfoWarning: Please go back to update your information.

officialItems.title: Official items
officialItems.description: These are official endemit items you can add to your checkout. Explore and add to your cart.

contactInfo.title: Your contact information
contactInfo.signedIn: You are signed in. Your email will be used for this order.
contactInfo.description: Ensure your email is correct as this is where you will receive your order confirmation.
contactInfo.descriptionWithTickets: Ensure your email is correct as this is where you will receive your order confirmation and digital tickets.

ticketHolder.title: Ticket holder information
ticketHolder.description: As a backup for lost tickets or inability to scan at the event, please provide the name of each ticket holder:

shipping.title: Shipping information
shipping.description: Please provide your shipping address where we will send your order.

customer.countryNotListed: Is your country not listed? Please <contact>contact us</contact>.

consent.terms: I confirm the order, accept and agree to the <terms>Terms and conditions</terms>, <privacy>Privacy policy</privacy>, and <withdrawal>Right to withdrawal</withdrawal>.
consent.nonRefundable: I understand and accept that my order contains non refundable items as stated in <notice>Notice on purchase of digital products</notice>.
consent.codeOfConduct: I understand, accept and will respect the applicable Code of conduct at Endemit events.

item.cannotShip: Warning, this product can not be shipped to {country}
item.maxQuantity: Warning, the maximum quantity for this product is {quantity}
item.availableUntil: This item is available for sale until

donation.title: Donations keep us running
donation.prompt:
Add {amount} donation to your total

and round up to {rounded}?
donation.description: We are volunteers dedicated to a non-profit. Donations support our work and help us keep ticket prices low.

actions.fillRequired: Please fill in all required fields to proceed to credit card payment. Fill in the remaining {count, plural, one {# required field.} other {# required fields.}}

cashless.title: Go Cashless at the Event
cashless.description: This event uses cashless payments with EndePay. Preload your wallet now and enjoy faster service at the bar and food stands.
cashless.cashNote: You can also top up with cash at the event

payment.cardError: An error occurred with your payment.
payment.unexpectedError: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
payment.securelyProcessed: Your payment is securely processed by Stripe. Your card details are never stored on our servers.

editForm.invalidFileType: Invalid file type. Allowed: JPEG, PNG, WebP

wallet.receiveFundsDesc: Show this QR to another user — they can scan it from their wallet to send you tokens.

wristband.title: Wristband
wristband.desc: Link a wristband to your account so you can still pay at POS registers if your phone dies or you decide to roam around without it.
wristband.linkedDesc: Top up your wallet from the sidebar to start paying with it.
wristband.wouldLinkDesc: Once linked, this wristband will be connected to your wallet. It can be scanned at a POS register and used as payment.
wristband.conflictTitle: Wristband {code} is linked to another account.
wristband.conflictDesc: If you believe this is a mistake, contact an crew member.
wristband.swapDesc: To link {code}, unlink your current wristband first by going to <editLink>Edit profile</editLink> and scan again.
wristband.linkForOffline: Link a wristband for offline checkout
wristband.infoText: Tap to show a QR sellers can scan at POS registers to charge your wallet. Linking a wristband gives you the same code on a physical bracelet, so you can pay even without a phone.
wristband.stickerConflictOther: This sticker is linked to another account.
wristband.stickerSwapRequired: You already have sticker {code} linked. Unlink it first.
wristband.scanHint: Point your camera at the QR on your wristband.

sidebar.endePayNotice: EndePay drives our cashless payments, it will be re-enabled before the festival in August.
sidebar.signOutConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to sign out of your account?

tickets.notUsedAtEvent: This ticket was not used at the event
tickets.showQr: Show this QR code at the entrance
tickets.alreadyUsed: This ticket has already been used
tickets.noLongerValid: This ticket is no longer valid
tickets.noneYetDesc: When you purchase event tickets, they will appear here.

orders.emptyDesc: When you make a purchase, your orders will appear here.
orders.ticketsIncluded: {count, plural, one {# ticket} other {# tickets}} included

topUp.noOptions: No top-up options available at the moment.
topUp.selectAmountDesc: Select an amount of tokens to add to your wallet
topUp.cashNotice: You can also top up the wallet with cash at the MERCH stand.

walletPay.handPhoneHint: Hand your phone to the seller — they will scan this code to charge your wallet.
walletPay.pointCamera: Point your camera at the QR code
walletPay.scanCodeHint: Scan QR or type the 4-character code from the register
walletPay.orderCancelledBySeller: Order was cancelled by the seller

eventsAttended.title: Events Attended
eventsAttended.noPastEvents: No past events available to claim.
eventsAttended.claimModalDesc: Select an event you attended but don't have a ticket for. Claims are reviewed and typically approved within a few minutes.

upcomingPromo.title: Upcoming Events
upcomingPromo.subtitle: Don't miss out - get your tickets!

errors.generic: An error occurred. Please try again.
errors.somethingWrong: Something went wrong. Please try again.

emailForm.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a code to sign in. No passwords, no registrations, it just works!
emailForm.createSubtitle: No account found. Click below to create one.
emailForm.label: Username or Email
emailForm.createConfirm: We'll create an account for {identifier} and send you a sign-in code.

errors.usernameInvalid: Username must be 2-30 characters (letters, numbers, underscore)
errors.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address
errors.usernameCantRegister: Please use an email address to create a new account
errors.createFailed: Failed to create account. Please try again.
errors.noAccountUsername: No account found with this username
errors.sendFailed: Failed to send code. Please try again.

verify.title: Enter Your Code
verify.resendSuccess: A new code has been sent to your email.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you are looking for does not exist.

newTicket.subject: 🎟️ Ticket for {eventName} ({name})
newTicket.heading: {name}, your Ticket is Ready!
newTicket.intro: Hi {name}, your secure ticket for {eventName} was generated. Please save this email and present the attached ticket at the entrance of the event.
newTicket.useOptions: You may use the attached ticket file, the <profile>ticket in your profile</profile> or your <wallet>Apple Wallet Ticket</wallet> <ios>(iOS only)</ios> to enter the event.
newTicket.infoValidOne: This ticket is valid for one person
newTicket.infoNonRefundable: Ticket is non-refundable, but you can transfer it to someone else
newTicket.infoCodeOfConduct: <link>Code of conduct</link> applies at all our events
newTicket.infoVenueTerms: Event entry is subject to venue's terms and conditions
newTicket.infoShowQr: Show this QR code at the entrance

orderCustomer.subject: Your order @ endemit
orderCustomer.confirmation: This is a confirmation of your order placed with us. Below are the details of your purchase.
orderCustomer.willShip: We will ship your order to the address provided shortly, usually within 3 - 5 days.
orderCustomer.ticketsInfo: Your tickets will be sent to your email within the next 10 minutes. Please check your inbox (and spam folder) for the ticket email. Each ticket will be sent separately with a QR code that you can present at the event for entry.
orderCustomer.invoiceNote: This email message serves as an invoice. Please feel free to reach out to our support team at <link>endemit@endemit.org</link> if you have any questions or need further assistance.

otcSignIn.subject: Your sign-in code: {code}
otcSignIn.heading: Your Sign-in Code
otcSignIn.intro: Use the code below to sign in to your account. This code will expire in {minutes, plural, one {# minute} other {# minutes}}.
otcSignIn.ignoreNote: If you did not request this code, you can safely ignore this email. Someone may have entered your email address by mistake.

orderShipped.subject: Your order has been shipped!
orderShipped.heading: Your order has been shipped!
orderShipped.body: Great news! Your order is now on its way to you. You can expect delivery within the next couple of work days.
orderShipped.questions: Questions about your delivery? Contact us at <link>endemit@endemit.org</link>

refund.subject: Refund processed for your order
refund.heading: Refund Processed
refund.intro: Your refund has been successfully processed. The funds will be returned to your original payment method within 5-10 business days.
refund.questions: If you have any questions about your refund, please contact our support team at <link>endemit@endemit.org</link>

ticketInvalidation.heading: {count, plural, one {Ticket Invalidated} other {Tickets Invalidated}}
ticketInvalidation.warning: The following {count, plural, one {ticket is} other {tickets are}} no longer valid and cannot be used for event entry. This is due to a refund being processed for the associated order.
ticketInvalidation.point1: {count, plural, one {This ticket} other {These tickets}} cannot be used for entry at the event.
ticketInvalidation.point2: Any QR codes or digital passes associated with {count, plural, one {this ticket} other {these tickets}} will not scan.
ticketInvalidation.point3: If you believe this is an error, please contact our support team immediately.
ticketInvalidation.questions: If you have any questions, please contact our support team at <link>endemit@endemit.org</link>

eventReminder.subject: Tomorrow: {eventName} - {count, plural, one {Your ticket is ready!} other {Your {count} tickets are ready!}}
eventReminder.heading: {eventName} is Tomorrow!
eventReminder.intro: {count, plural, one {Your ticket for {eventName} is attached and ready for tomorrow. Just show it at the door to get validated. You can also use the digital ticket link or add it to your Apple Wallet. See you on the floor!} other {Your {count} tickets for {eventName} are attached and ready for tomorrow. Just show them at the door to get validated. You can also use the digital ticket links or add them to your Apple Wallet. See you on the floor!}}
eventReminder.reminderShowQr: Show your QR code at the entrance
eventReminder.reminderOnePerson: Each ticket is valid for one person
eventReminder.reminderCodeOfConduct: <link>Code of conduct</link> applies at all our events

eventClaim.subject: {eventName} has been added to your profile
eventClaim.heading: Event Added to Your Profile!
eventClaim.body: Great news! {eventName} has been added to your "Events Attended" list. Thanks for being part of our community!

sticker.howToUseBody: If your phone is dead or missing at a POS register, show the wristband to the cashier. They can scan it (or type the code) and the payment screen will appear on their device for you to confirm.

linked.subject: Your backup sticker is active
linked.heading: Your wristband is active
linked.intro: A wristband is now linked to your Endemit wallet. Keep it with you and use it at bars or shops within the area to make payments using your online balance.

replaced.subject: Your wristband was updated
replaced.heading: Your wristband was updated
replaced.intro: Your previous wristband has been replaced. The old code will no longer work at POS registers — only the new one below.

unlinked.subject: Your wristband sticker was removed
unlinked.heading: Your wristband sticker was removed
unlinked.intro: The wristband below is no longer linked to your Endemit wallet and can't be used to pay at POS registers anymore.
unlinked.outro: You can link a new wristband any time from your profile settings.

walletTransfer.questions: If you have any questions, please contact us at <link>endemit@endemit.org</link>.

posTransaction.subject: Transaction Receipt #{code} @ endemit
posTransaction.heading: Transaction Confirmed
posTransaction.receiptNote: This email serves as a receipt for your transaction. If you have any questions, please contact us at <link>endemit@endemit.org</link>

music.subscribeNewEpisode: Subscribe and be notified when we release a new emit episode

endemit.defaultDescription: Receive updates about our upcoming events, music, and announcements

festival.defaultDescription: Endemit Festival is private community gathering, accessible only by invitation. If you'd like to become a member, sign up and we'll send you more info.

subscribe.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address
